note: Pre-review for the enrollment quest of a registered future module: Narcissus. Commissioned by The Eye (2026-07-18). The Eye APPROVED + APPLIED the vocabulary amendment: Narcissus's registered meaning is now front-end PRODUCTION (not only a review loop) — verified across the vocabulary file + enrollment.json + repository-manifest.json (verify-contracts 215/215). next_phase_workshop: docs/runs/narcissus-1-workshop/ — the Daedalus workshop matures the APPROACH (iliad/tools/run-daedalus-workshop.mjs). Then TELOS authorization (a real authz council), then Argo implementation (the actual React/WebGL front-end).
authority_basis: The Eye directive 2026-07-18 (commission Narcissus; APPROVE + APPLY the vocabulary amendment; ADOPT the 'WebGL is paint' invariant) + file:docs/institutional-memory/iliad/CONTRACTS/enrollment.json (narcissus) + the AMENDED registered meaning: docs/mythological-vocabulary.md#Narcissus ('production of full-rollout, award-standard front-ends ... through the reflection loop').

honest_scope.registered_meaning_is_the_boundary: Narcissus PRODUCES full-rollout, award-standard front-ends through the reflection loop (render -> look hard -> refine -> look again, until worthy). It does NOT weave (Clotho), measure (Lachesis), authorize (TELOS), or retire (Atropos). Front-ends are for the enrolled PRODUCTS (ai-forge / forge / saas-forge), NOT for TELOS's zero-dependency governance core (which stays framework-free).
honest_scope.deliverable_cycle_1: The FLAGSHIP development-story front-end: a React + WebGL surface telling TELOS's OWN honest self-build story (AI-START-HERE -> Iliad quests -> Daedalus workshops -> TELOS councils -> reality-correction -> 'AI system architecture that CAN'T BE LOST'), sourced from the authored institutional-memory records + the Clotho weave. Direction: the breakout-synthesized 'Loom on Trial / Crucible Weave' (the Clotho weave as a suspended, tension-loaded loom; the visitor moves among discrete forensic STATIONS; stalemates are knots/scars; reality-corrections are fused slag; a reverse-topological 'unraveling' climax).
honest_scope.normative_architecture_invariant: 'WebGL is PAINT, never TRUTH' (adopted NORMATIVE by The Eye): the Three.js/WebGL canvas is a PURE presentational view-layer; ALL state, interaction, and progression live in a deterministic finite-state machine (XState) + a typed command registry in the DOM; EVERY interactive 3D element is shadowed by an invisible, semantically-correct HTML control (so it is both deterministically E2E-testable AND accessible); a forced test-mode (?e2e=1) freezes RNG (seeded PRNG), pins the physics timestep, and disables springs/settle for deterministic E2E. This invariant is what makes the functional gate blade passable and MUST be a plan invariant.
honest_scope.gate_two_blades: (1) AESTHETIC — Eye-judged HUMAN review; beauty has NO deterministic oracle, so the gate is The Eye's judgment over visual evidence (screenshots/renders/live), recorded AS SUCH (do NOT fake an oracle) + mechanizable aesthetic-adjacent checks (a11y, Core-Web-Vitals perf budgets, no-templated-defaults). (2) FUNCTIONAL — a DETERMINISTIC E2E suite asserting EVERY interactive element (buttons, panels, dropdowns, reports, nav, exports) works, driven through the DOM-shadowed controls under ?e2e=1 (browser-driven, e.g. Playwright / chrome-devtools MCP). 'good enough' FAILS both blades.
honest_scope.evidence_ledger: Every claim the story makes is grounded in a REAL institutional-memory record (evidence-vs-uncertainty, LEXI's forensic ethos) — the surface cites its sources; it does not narrate unbacked triumph.
honest_scope.aesthetic_reference: LEXI (docs/runs/narcissus-1-prequest/lexi-tokens.md — cloned + real tokens): dark near-black canvas (#05070b/#0b0f1a), signature red/crimson accent (#ef4444/#b91c1c) with red bloom-glow, amber alerts, Inter + JetBrains Mono, a mouse-reactive simplex-noise ferrofluid WebGL hero, full light/dark theming. LEXI is the floor; the standard reached for is Awwwards-Site-of-the-Year immersion.
honest_scope.normativity_split: The FUNCTIONAL E2E suite is NORMATIVE-CURRENT with an executable oracle (deterministic over ?e2e=1 DOM-shadowed controls). The AESTHETIC verdict is ADVISORY / Eye-judged — a human authority for what a machine cannot certify, NOT a faked oracle.
honest_scope.enrollment_flip_flagged_for_the_eye: Enrolling Narcissus (manifest entry_points.memory_dirs + moving out of future_modules_registered_unimplemented + the verify-contracts expectation) is a routed decision for The Eye at the authorization gate, not resolved unilaterally. (The vocabulary amendment itself is already applied.)
honest_scope.non_goals_cycle_1: No product BACK-END changes; no other future modules (Hermes/Medusa/Atropos); the front-end targets products, never the zero-dep core; no new governance enforcement (Narcissus produces surfaces, it does not gate merges).

model_review.note: seats env-resolved over build-gate/seats.json; no seat change proposed. Argo implementation seats + TELOS authz council seats resolved at those gates. The aesthetic blade adds a HUMAN authority (The Eye) that no seat replaces.

capability_review.pre_quest_completed: docs/runs/narcissus-1-prequest/ — vocabulary-amendment (approved+applied), lexi-tokens.md (reality-grounded), award-references.md, breakout-synthesis.md (+ raw round1/round2 JSON).
optimizations_adopted: Reality-first: cloned LEXI + read the actual tokens/shaders rather than inferring (the Lachesis lesson: a plan defensible in the abstract can be wrong about reality).
Front-load the hard constraint: the 'WebGL is paint' invariant is carried as NORMATIVE so the workshop cannot converge on a beautiful-but-untestable surface.
The aesthetic blade has no oracle — record it as Eye-judged rather than manufacture a fake deterministic test.
NEVER abbreviate an authority/content-address anchor (full 40-hex only); use the parameterized workshop harness; VERIFY adversary claims before implementing.
missing_external_capabilities: a browser-driver for the functional E2E blade (Playwright / chrome-devtools MCP) at implementation; a 3D-walkthrough plugin (locate at Argo)
